normalized_shade_records.source_document: 2023 Matrix Manual Haircolor (official PDF, 82 pages, cover: '2023 Manual Haircolor')

data_gaps: Processing time stated as a range (30-45 minutes room temperature; full 45 minutes when lifting more than 1 level and when depositing on gray) - see line record; scalar field left null.

normalized_shade_records.special_usage_notes: SoColor 10 min Pre-Bonded collection (manual pp.51-52); one of the '8 different technologies' of SoColor per the manual FAQ, also branded separately as 'SoColor 10 min Pre-Bonded'. 10 neutral shades. 5-minute buffer window to control over-processing between minutes 10-15. Can be mixed with: only other SoColor 10 min shades. After first application do not pull through ends; SoColor Sync recommended for refreshing.
normalized_shade_records.source_document: 2023 Matrix Manual Haircolor (official PDF, 82 pages, cover: '2023 Manual Haircolor')
assumptions: Mixing ratio, developer, processing time, gray-coverage and lift values are stated in the manual at the collection level, not per individual shade; applied here to each shade of that collection.

Level inferred from the '50'+level code convention stated in the manual for Extra Coverage/DreamAge ('50: Indicates that it covers over 50% gray hair. 4: Indicates the level.') and from the palette level-column placement; the decoding page does not explicitly cover SoColor 10 min codes.
data_gaps: Lift capability not stated for the SoColor 10 min collection.
Shade codes 504N-509N duplicate Extra Coverage palette codes; manual does not state whether they are shared SKUs.
Shade name not printed per shade in the 2023 manual (palette charts show codes only); shade_name left null.

manufacturer_tone_descriptions: Clear (decoding p.110): 'Use with other shades to reduce tonal deposit by 1 level when mixed equally. Use alone to add shine without changing tone. Available in Alkaline and Acidic.'
normalized_shade_records.mixing_ratio: 1:1 (SoColor Sync Clear + Matrix 10 Volume (3%) Cream Developer)
normalized_shade_records.special_usage_notes: SoColor Sync Clear (manual pp.97-98). Best for diluting SoColor Sync alkaline shades and adding shine. Adding an equal amount of Clear to any SoColor Sync shade will lessen the color deposit by approximately one level. Alkaline Clear can also dilute a Fast Toner shade (1:1). Palette chart footnote: '*Available in Alkaline & Acidic Technologies'.
normalized_shade_records.source_document: 2023 Matrix Manual Haircolor (official PDF, 82 pages, cover: '2023 Manual Haircolor')

normalized_shade_records.mixing_ratio: 1:1 (SoColor Sync + 10 Volume (3%) Matrix Cream Developer); may be diluted with SoColor Sync alkaline Clear in a 1:1 ratio
normalized_shade_records.special_usage_notes: SoColor Sync Fast Toners (manual pp.101-102): 'Highly pigmented oxidative dyes for express pre-toning.' Apply to clean towel-dried hair at the sink/back bar. Processing 2-5 minutes. No background - pure toned, fully pigmented. Can be used on natural hair. Leaving on longer than 5 minutes can lead to over-deposit and possible shift in natural level. Can be mixed with: SoColor Sync Alkaline Clear only (Alkaline shades should not be mixed with Fast shades).
